headline: MetLife’s Q1 Earnings Call: Our Top 5 Analyst Questions
summary: MetLife’s first quarter results saw the company outperform Wall Street’s revenue and non-GAAP profit expectations, but the market responded negatively. Management attributed growth to strong premium volumes across all major operating segments, disciplined expense control, and favorable investment returns, particularly in private equity and venture capital. CEO Michel Khalaf emphasized that “adjusted earnings were ahead of last year for all operating business segments with across-the-board top li
